parameters.query: SELECT h.system_id, s.system_name, s.display_name, s.teams_webhook_url, h.collector_type, h.metric_group, COUNT(*) as anomaly_hours, MAX(h.llm_severity) as worst_severity, STRING_AGG(h.llm_trend, ' → ' ORDER BY h.hour_bucket) FILTER (WHERE h.llm_trend IS NOT NULL) as trend_sequence, STRING_AGG(h.llm_prediction, ' | ' ORDER BY h.hour_bucket) FILTER (WHERE h.llm_prediction IS NOT NULL) as predictions FROM metric_hourly_aggregations h JOIN systems s ON h.system_id = s.id WHERE h.hour_bucket >= NOW() - interval '8 hours' AND h.llm_severity IN ('warning', 'critical') GROUP BY h.system_id, s.system_name, s.display_name, s.teams_webhook_url, h.collector_type, h.metric_group HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY worst_severity DESC, anomaly_hours DESC LIMIT 20

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_code: $env.LLM_AGENT_CODE, api_key: $env.LLM_API_KEY, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.llm_prompt }], max_tokens: 300 }) }}

nodes.name: LLM 응답 파싱 및 카드 생성

parameters.query: INSERT INTO alert_history (system_id, alert_type, severity, alertname, title, description, created_at) VALUES ({{ $('LLM 응답 파싱 및 카드 생성').first().json.system_id }}, 'proactive_trend', '{{ $('LLM 응답 파싱 및 카드 생성').first().json.llm_result.severity || 'warning' }}', 'ProactiveTrendAlert', '{{ $('LLM 응답 파싱 및 카드 생성').first().json.display_name }} 지속 이상 감지', '{{ $('LLM 응답 파싱 및 카드 생성').first().json.llm_result.trend_summary || '' }}', NOW())

main.node: LLM 응답 파싱 및 카드 생성
